title: Lora Sullivan
compiled_truth: Lora Sullivan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-13 to 2002-02-21), Lora Sullivan sent 61 and received 515 emails, totalling 576 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (32), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (20), [Linda Robertson](people/linda-robertson) (16), [Chris Long](people/chris-long) (14), [Maureen Mcvicker](people/maureen-mcvicker) (14). Mailbox folders observed: 2001_objectives, compliments, deleted_items, presentations.
